name: Perplexity AI
summary: Perplexity wants to make search engines without AI a thing of the past. Cofounded by Aravind Srinivas, Johnny Ho, Denis Yarats and Andy Konwinski in 2022, it uses a medley of AI models to answer users’ questions on a wide range of topics, which it backs up with footnoted sources.

sources.title: Perplexity AI scores $200M at $20B valuation, amid growing competition in AI Search — TFN
Perplexity revenue surges 50% as AI startup shifts from search to autonomous AI agents - Tech Startups
